0.question: 1- Who can sell on Qafila?
0.answer: Manufacturers, local brands, registered businesses, and suppliers offering Saudi-made or approved products can apply to sell on Qafila.

1.question: 2- Do I need a Saudi commercial registration?
1.answer: Yes, a valid Saudi commercial registration (CR) is required to sell on Qafila. This ensures compliance with local regulations and builds trust with buyers.

2.question: 3- What types of products are allowed?
2.answer: Qafila supports a wide range of product categories including fashion, electronics, home goods, food products, and more. All products must comply with Saudi regulations.

3.question: 4- How does selling to government entities work?
3.answer: Through our B2G program, approved sellers can participate in government procurement processes with dedicated compliance tools and documentation support.

4.question: 5- What are the fees or commissions?
4.answer: Qafila operates on a transparent commission-based model. Fees vary by plan and category. Check our pricing section for detailed information.

5.question: 7- Who handles shipping and delivery?
5.answer: Sellers can choose from integrated shipping partners or manage their own logistics. Qafila provides tools to manage orders and track deliveries seamlessly.

contact.title: You have different questions?

intro.title: Getting Started as a Seller
intro.description: Joining Qafila opens new opportunities for your business to sell, scale, and connect with trusted buyers. We've made the registration process clear and straightforward, so you can focus on building your store and growing your sales.

step1.title: Step 1: Register Your Account
step1.description: Start by clicking the Register button in the hero section of the page. This will take you to the seller registration flow, where you begin setting up your Qafila store.
step1.imageAlt: Screenshot: Register button on the Qafila homepage

step2.title: Step 2: Enter Your Personal Data
step2.point1: 1- Fill in your basic personal information so we can create your seller profile.
step2.point2: 2- This includes your full name, email address, city, and phone number.
step2.point3: 3- These details are used for communication and account verification only.

step3.title: Step 3: Verify Your Phone Number (OTP)
step3.point1: 1- A 6-digit verification code will be sent to your phone number.
step3.point2: 2- Enter the code to verify your identity and secure your account.
step3.point3: 3- This step ensures only you can access and manage your seller account.

step4.title: Step 4: Set Up Your Store
step4.point1: 1- Choose your store name, upload a logo, and write a short description.
step4.point2: 2- This is your brand identity on Qafila — make it stand out to attract buyers.
step4.point3: 3- You can update your store details anytime from the vendor dashboard.

step5.title: Step 5: Add Transaction & Business Documents
step5.point1: 1- Provide the required business and financial information to enable transactions.
step5.point2: 2- This includes your Commercial Register or Freelance Document, along with your bank account details for payouts.
step5.point3: 3- All information is securely stored and used only for payment processing.

step6.title: Step 6: Review and Accept Policies
step6.point1: 1- Read and agree to the following policies to proceed with your application.
step6.point2: 2- Review Qafila's policies and terms to protect both your rights and the platform's rights.
step6.point3: 3- Accepting these policies ensures transparency, secure transactions, and a trusted selling environment for everyone.

step7.title: Step 7: Access Your Store Dashboard
step7.point1: 1- Once your information is submitted and verified, you'll gain access to your store dashboard.
step7.point2: 2- This is where you manage everything related to your store and start selling on Qafila.

productsTab.title: a- Products Tab
productsTab.point1: 1- Add, edit, and manage your products with ease.
productsTab.point2: 2- Upload product details, set prices, and control availability directly from this section.

ordersTab.title: b- Orders Tab: Manage and track all your orders in one place
ordersTab.point1: 1- View and manage all incoming orders from customers.
ordersTab.point2: 2- Track order status, process shipments, and handle returns from this section.

statisticsTab.title: c- Statistics Tab: Track your performance and understand the market
statisticsTab.point1: 1- View detailed insights about your store's performance, including sales, orders, and product activity.
statisticsTab.point2: 2- Upgrade your Qafila package to unlock advanced market insights and compare your brand with competitors.
